metadata.description: Git CLI operations, workflows, and automation for modern development (2025)

plugins.name: mastering-git-cli
plugins.description: Git CLI operations, workflows, and automation for modern development (2025). Use when working with repositories, commits, branches, merging, rebasing, worktrees, submodules, or multi-repo architectures. Includes parallel agent workflow patterns for isolated worktree development, comprehensive merge strategy selection, conflict resolution, and recovery procedures.
